reasoning_model_1: The audio generated by Model 1 strictly follows the user's command. The content '别担心，一切都会好起来的' [0:00-0:03] is accurate with no hallucinations or omissions. In terms of the core paralinguistic feature '音高' (Pitch), the model successfully modulates the voice to a lower register (Low Pitch/Deep Voice). The tone is deep, resonant, and calming, which aligns perfectly with the instruction '请用低音说' (Please say in a low pitch). The prosody is natural and stable, effectively conveying the intended comfort.
reasoning_model_2: Model 2 fails significantly in content accuracy. While it begins with the required text, it proceeds to read out the style description itself: '，声音沉稳如大地回响，像老树在风中轻轻点头，稳稳地托住你的心' [0:03-0:10]. This is a severe hallucination/instruction leakage error. Regarding the '音高' (Pitch) dimension, because the model is reading the description of the voice rather than embodying it, it fails to deliver the specific controllable feature intended for the dialogue alone. The presence of the extra text completely disrupts the user's intent, leading to a score of 0.
model_comparison: Model 1 is the clear winner. It accurately speaks the target text and correctly implements the 'Low Pitch' feature, resulting in a high-quality, instruction-compliant audio. Model 2, on the other hand, suffers from a critical failure where it vocalizes the prompt's descriptive text (instruction leakage) instead of applying the style to the target text. This makes the audio unusable and completely incorrect according to the scoring criteria.
